C1.descriptionTemplate: Tulu obtains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Tentacle Limit +1. For each Arithmetica consumed or each Tulu Command Card discarded, obtain [TentaclePower:Arg2] {Tentacle DMG} and [Power:Arg2] {STR}.

C2.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG, which enjoys an additional [Arg4]% {Tentacle DMG} and {STR} bonus. Tulu obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. {Aftershock}: Command 1 Tentacle to attack.

C3.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Tulu obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. {Aftershock}: Command 1 Tentacle to attack.

C4.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] {Pierce DMG} to all enemies, which enjoys an additional [Arg3]% {Tentacle DMG} and {STR} bonus. Make all Tentacles attack [Arg2] times, dealing {Pierce DMG}. {Aftershock}: Command 1 Tentacle to attack.

C5.descriptionTemplate: Dispel self {Weakness} state. Obtain [TentaclePower:Arg1] Temporary {Tentacle DMG} and [Power:Arg1] Temporary {STR}. If the current Stance is {Tranquil Sea}, additionally reduce all enemies' {STR⯆} by [Exhaustion:Arg3] this turn. {Aftershock}: Command 1 Tentacle to attack.

Exalt.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Arg1] Tentacles. Gain [TentaclePower:Arg2] Temporary {Tentacle DMG} and [Power:Arg2] Temporary {STR}. Gain [Arg3]% Temporary Crit. Rate.

OverExalt.descriptionTemplate: Command all Tentacles to attack twice at turn end.

T1.descriptionTemplate: For every point of Aliemus Regen Level Tulu and his equipped WoD & Covenant have, {Strike} enjoys +5% {Tentacle DMG} and {STR} bonus. {Abyss Order} receives 15% {Tentacle DMG} and {STR} DMG boost.

T2.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Aliemus after the start of exploration.

T3.descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF are increased by [Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Each Tentacle's attack increases Temporary {Tentacle DMG} by [Arg3]% of Tulu's ATK, up to [Arg4] times per turn.
When there are 1/2/3 other {Lemurian} Awakeners in the team, all enemies receive 10%/25%/50% more {Tentacle DMG}.

E1.descriptionTemplate: {Abyss Order} commands Tentacles to attack all enemies. If the current Stance is {Tranquil Sea}, Arithmetica Cost -2.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] {Pierce DMG} to all enemies, which enjoys an additional [Arg3]% {Tentacle DMG} and {STR} bonus. Make all Tentacles attack [Arg2] times, dealing {Pierce DMG}. If the current Stance is {Tranquil Sea}, reduce Arithmetica Cost by 2. {Aftershock}: Command 1 Tentacle to attack.

E2.descriptionTemplate: {Strike} gains Temporary {STR} and Temporary {Tentacle DMG} equal to [Arg1]% of Tulu's ATK, while {Defense} gains Temporary {STR} and Temporary {Tentacle DMG} equal to [Arg2]% of Tulu's ATK (effects scale with the levels of {Strike} and {Defense}).

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG, which enjoys an additional [Arg4]% {Tentacle DMG} and {STR} bonus. Tulu obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. Obtain [TentaclePower:Arg3] Temporary {Tentacle DMG} and [Power:Arg3] Temporary {STR}. {Aftershock}: Command 1 Tentacle to attack.
Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Tulu obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. Obtain [TentaclePower:Arg3] Temporary {Tentacle DMG} and [Power:Arg3] Temporary {STR}. {Aftershock}: Command 1 Tentacle to attack.

E3.descriptionTemplate: At turn end, Tulu obtains 5 Aliemus. {When Lemuria Returns} increases Temporary Crit. Rate by 15%.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Dispel self {Weakness} state. Obtain [TentaclePower:Arg1] Temporary {Tentacle DMG} and [Power:Arg1] Temporary {STR}. Obtain [Arg2]% Temporary Crit. Rate. If the current Stance is {Tranquil Sea}, additionally reduce all enemies' {STR⯆} by [Exhaustion:Arg3] this turn. {Aftershock}: Command 1 Tentacle to attack.
